testCases.name: Simple Blog Post
testCases.input: Create a BlogPost aggregate with postId as UUID for identity, title as text required, content as text, and publishedAt as optional datetime.

testCases.name: User Entity
testCases.input: User entity with userId UUID identity, email as text, name as text required.

testCases.name: Product Value Object
testCases.input: Money value object with amount as decimal and currency as text.

testCases.name: Simple Category
testCases.input: Category aggregate with categoryId UUID, name text required, description text optional.

testCases.name: Tag Entity
testCases.input: Tag entity with tagId as UUID for identity, tagName as text required.

testCases.name: Comment Aggregate
testCases.input: Comment aggregate with commentId UUID identity, authorName text, content text required, createdAt datetime.

testCases.name: Author Entity
testCases.input: Author entity with authorId UUID identity, fullName text required, bio text optional.

testCases.name: Address Value Object
testCases.input: Address value object with street text, city text required, country text, postalCode text.

testCases.name: Simple Order
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, totalAmount decimal, orderDate datetime.

testCases.name: Customer Entity
testCases.input: Customer entity with customerId UUID for identity, firstName text, lastName text, email text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 11
testCases.input: Create a Simple11 entity with id UUID identity and name text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 12
testCases.input: Create a Simple12 entity with id UUID identity, value int.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 13
testCases.input: Create a Simple13 entity with id UUID identity, label text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 14
testCases.input: Create a Simple14 entity with id UUID identity, code text, active boolean.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 15
testCases.input: Create a Simple15 entity with id UUID identity, createdAt datetime.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 16
testCases.input: Create a Simple16 entity with id UUID identity, score decimal.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 17
testCases.input: Create a Simple17 entity with id UUID identity, name text, age int.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 18
testCases.input: Create a Simple18 entity with id UUID identity, active boolean.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 19
testCases.input: Create a Simple19 entity with id UUID identity, status text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 20
testCases.input: Create a Simple20 entity with id UUID identity, description text optional.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 21
testCases.input: Create a Simple21 entity with id UUID identity, name text, createdAt datetime.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 22
testCases.input: Create a Simple22 entity with id UUID identity, tag text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 23
testCases.input: Create a Simple23 entity with id UUID identity, rate decimal.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 24
testCases.input: Create a Simple24 entity with id UUID identity, title text required.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 25
testCases.input: Create a Simple25 entity with id UUID identity, description text.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 26
testCases.input: Create a Simple26 entity with id UUID identity, code text, valid boolean.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 27
testCases.input: Create a Simple27 entity with id UUID identity, label text, amount decimal.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 28
testCases.input: Create a Simple28 entity with id UUID identity, priority int.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 29
testCases.input: Create a Simple29 entity with id UUID identity, flag boolean.

testCases.name: Simple Entity 30
testCases.input: Create a Simple30 entity with id UUID identity, nickname text.

testCases.name: Blog with Items
testCases.input: BlogPost aggregate with postId UUID identity, title text required, body text, tags list of text. Include behavior to addTag(tagText) with non-empty tag.

testCases.name: Order with Items and Discount
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, items list of OrderItem, discount decimal optional, totalAmount decimal. When applying discount, reduce totalAmount accordingly. OrderItem { itemId UUID, productName text, quantity int, unitPrice decimal }

testCases.name: Inventory with Stock
testCases.input: Product aggregate with productId UUID identity, stock int, price decimal. When selling, require stock > 0 and decrease stock by 1, emit ItemSold event.

testCases.name: Customer with Orders
testCases.input: Customer entity with customerId UUID identity, name text, email text, orders list of Order references. When adding order, ensure reference exists.

testCases.name: Address with Validation
testCases.input: Address value object with street text, city text, country text, postalCode text. Validation: postalCode must match pattern [A-Z0-9]{3,10}.

testCases.name: Event Sourced Order
testCases.input: Order aggregate with event sourcing: append(OrderPlaced) when placing order.

testCases.name: Product with Category
testCases.input: Product aggregate with productId UUID identity, category text, price decimal, tags list of text.

testCases.name: Shipment with Tracking
testCases.input: Shipment aggregate with shipmentId UUID identity, orderId UUID, status text. When shipped, emit ShipmentSent.

testCases.name: CustomerProfile with Address
testCases.input: CustomerProfile entity with profileId UUID identity, customerId UUID, bio text optional, address Address value object.

testCases.name: OrderService with Methods
testCases.input: Service OrderService with method placeOrder(customerId UUID, items List[OrderItem]) returns Order.

testCases.name: Inventory with Reorder Point
testCases.input: Inventory aggregate with productId UUID identity, stock int, reorderPoint int. If stock <= reorderPoint, emit ReorderNeeded.

testCases.name: Payment with Status
testCases.input: Payment aggregate with paymentId UUID identity, amount decimal, status text. When paying, status -> PROCESSED and emit PaymentCompleted.

testCases.name: Customer with Addresses
testCases.input: Customer entity with customerId UUID identity, addresses List[Address], primaryAddress Address.

testCases.name: Shipment and Carrier
testCases.input: Shipment aggregate with shipmentId UUID identity, carrier text, trackingCode text.

testCases.name: Cart with Items
testCases.input: Cart aggregate with cartId UUID identity, items List[CartItem], total Decimal. CartItem with productId UUID, quantity int.

testCases.name: Audit Trail for User
testCases.input: User entity with userId UUID identity, createdAt datetime, updatedAt datetime. Audit trail enabled for changes to user data.

testCases.name: Product Search Service
testCases.input: Service ProductSearch with query text, results List[Product], paging page int, size int.

testCases.name: Order with Discounts
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, items List[OrderItem], discountCode text optional.

testCases.name: Inventory withLocation
testCases.input: Inventory item with productId UUID identity, location text, stock int.

testCases.name: Ticket with Status
testCases.input: Ticket aggregate with ticketId UUID identity, status text, priority int.

testCases.name: Notification with Payload
testCases.input: Notification event with payload Map[String, String], recipientId UUID.

testCases.name: Review Workflow
testCases.input: Workflow Review with steps: Submit, Approve, Publish. Each step requires role text.

testCases.name: CustomerMessage Channel
testCases.input: Entity CustomerMessage with id UUID identity, channel text, payload String. Route messages via Channel.

testCases.name: Billing with Invoice
testCases.input: Billing aggregate with invoiceId UUID identity, amount decimal, dueDate datetime. When generating invoice, emit InvoiceGenerated with totalAmount.

testCases.name: Wallet with Transfer
testCases.input: Wallet aggregate with walletId UUID identity, balance decimal. Transfer between wallets requires amount > 0 and sufficient balance.

testCases.name: Shipment with Carrier Tracking
testCases.input: Shipment with carrier text, trackingCode text, status text. On delivery, emit Delivered event.

testCases.name: Product with Reviews
testCases.input: Product aggregate with productId UUID identity, name text, reviews List[Review]. Review with reviewer text, rating int.

testCases.name: Workflow with Conditions
testCases.input: Workflow OrderApproval with steps and conditions: if totalAmount > 1000 then require managerApproval.

testCases.name: Event Sourcing Domain
testCases.input: Domain with event sourcing using CustomerUpdated event on Customer entity update.

testCases.name: Subscription with Plan
testCases.input: Subscription aggregate with subscriptionId UUID identity, plan text, userId UUID. When activated, emit Subscribed event.

testCases.name: Comment Thread with Replies
testCases.input: CommentThread with threadId UUID identity, comments List[Comment], each Comment with commenter text, message text.

testCases.name: FAQ with Topics
testCases.input: FAQ aggregate with faqId UUID identity, topics List[String], answer text.

testCases.name: Blog with Tags
testCases.input: Blog aggregate with blogId UUID identity, tags List[String], content text.

testCases.name: Invoice with LineItems
testCases.input: Invoice aggregate with invoiceId UUID identity, items List[LineItem], total decimal. LineItem with description text, amount decimal.

testCases.name: Reservation with Seats
testCases.input: Reservation aggregate with reservationId UUID identity, seats List[Seat], status text. Seat with seatNumber int.

testCases.name: ProductCategory with Hierarchy
testCases.input: ProductCategory with categoryId UUID identity, parentId UUID optional, name text.

testCases.name: CustomerSearch Service
testCases.input: Service CustomerSearch with query text, results List[Customer], page int, pageSize int.

testCases.name: AuditLog with Timestamps
testCases.input: AuditLog entity with logId UUID identity, action text, timestamp datetime.

testCases.name: ComplexEcosystem with BoundedContexts
testCases.input: Ecosystem with 3 bounded contexts: SalesContext, ShippingContext, InventoryContext. Each with at least 2 aggregates and domain events. Complex cross-context interactions via events and repositories.

testCases.name: Run-on Sentence with Abbreviations
testCases.input: Create a ProdCat with catId UUID, name text, desc text; on upd, update stock-qty etc, ensure consistent invariants across systems (E2E).

testCases.name: Complex Event Chain
testCases.input: Event chain: UserCreated -> UserGrantedRole -> AccessChecked with role hierarchy across domains.

testCases.name: Ambiguous Names with Typos
testCases.input: Create an Entty with entiyId UUID; mis-spelled fields test for parser resilience.

testCases.name: High-Complexity Cross-Entity Relations
testCases.input: Order with items, shipments, taxes; multiple relations across Inventory, Billing, and Shipping domains; ensure referential integrity and cascade behaviors.

testCases.name: Multi-Root Aggregates
testCases.input: Bounded contexts with multiple root aggregates in a single context: Customer, Order, Payment all under EcommerceContext.

testCases.name: Temporal Queries
testCases.input: Domain supports time-bounded queries: orders in last 30 days, shipments pending, etc.

testCases.name: Security with Roles
testCases.input: Security domain with roles: Admin, Manager, User; access rules per role across resources.

testCases.name: Migration Plan
testCases.input: Migration plan from v1 to v2 with data mapping across entities; preserve identity; run in batches.

testCases.name: Monolith to Microservice
testCases.input: Refactor a monolith into 3 microservices with explicit service boundaries and communication via events.

testCases.name: Unknown Token Handling
testCases.input: Parser must handle unknown tokens gracefully and continue parsing subsequent tokens without failing.

testCases.name: Cross-Context Validation
testCases.input: Validation across 2 bounded contexts for shared value objects; ensure consistency.

testCases.name: Async Domain Commands
testCases.input: Commands processed asynchronously with eventual consistency across services.

testCases.name: Temporal Data Versioning
testCases.input: Entities support historical versions with version fields; queries can access previous versions.

testCases.name: Complex Aggregation
testCases.input: Complex aggregation across 4 aggregates with cross references; ensure cycles are avoided by design.

testCases.name: Schema Evolution
testCases.input: Schema evolves with deprecation of fields; provide migration plan and backward compatibility.

testCases.name: Eventually Consistent Cache
testCases.input: Cache layer with eventual consistency for read-heavy aggregates; invalidation strategy per event.

testCases.name: Multi-Table Joins in DSL
testCases.input: DSL supports multi-entity joins across tables; ensure join syntax is unambiguous.

testCases.name: Backwards Compatibility
testCases.input: Maintain backwards compatibility for API consumers during refactor.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext CompatibilityContext {
    version: "v2"; backwardCompatibility: true }

testCases.name: Distributed Tracing
testCases.input: Instrument calls with distributed tracing across services.
testCases.expectedOutput: BoundedContext TracingContext { traceId: String; spans: List[String] }

testCases.name: SchemaValidation
testCases.input: DDL-like validations for schema correctness with constraint propagation.

testCases.name: Orchestration with Deadlines
testCases.input: Orchestrator ensures tasks complete within deadlines; timeout handling.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext OrchestrationContext {
    tasks: List[Task]; deadline: DateTime; timeout: Duration }

testCases.name: Data Consistency across Boundaries
testCases.input: Cross-context data consistency with saga pattern.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext ConsistencyContext {
    SagaPattern: enabled; crossContext: true }

testCases.name: Rich Domain Model
testCases.input: Rich domain model with multiple value objects and complex invariants.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext DomainModelContext {
    Entities: [E1, E2]; ValueObjects: [VO1, VO2] }

testCases.name: Dynamic DSL Extensions
testCases.input: DSL supports dynamic extension modules for new domains at runtime.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext DSLContext {
    Extensions: [DynamicModule] }

testCases.name: Fault Tolerance
testCases.input: System tolerates partial failures; circuit breakers per service.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext ResilienceContext {
    circuits: List[CircuitBreaker] }

testCases.name: Load Testing Scenarios
testCases.input: Load test scenario with 100 concurrent users; measure latency and error rate.
testCases.expectedOutput:
BoundedContext TestingContext {
    Scenarios: [LoadTest100Users] }

testCases.name: Global Configuration
testCases.input: Global configuration for all bounded contexts: timeouts, retry counts, feature toggles.

testCases.name: Blog with Behaviors
testCases.input: BlogPost aggregate with postId UUID identity, title text required max 200 chars, content text, status text default DRAFT. When publishing, require that title not empty and content not empty, then set status to PUBLISHED, emit PostPublished event.

testCases.name: Order with Items
testCases.input: Order aggregate with orderId UUID identity, customerId UUID required, totalAmount decimal min 0, orderDate datetime. Contains OrderItem entity with itemId UUID identity, productName text required, quantity integer min 1, unitPrice decimal. When adding item, require quantity greater than 0, then add to items list, recalculate total.

testCases.name: E-Commerce Platform
testCases.input: Create an e-commerce platform with Order aggregate containing orderId UUID identity, customerId UUID, items list of OrderItem, totalAmount decimal, status text. OrderItem entity with productId UUID, productName text, quantity integer, unitPrice decimal. When placing order, require items not empty, calculate total from sum of item prices, then set status to PENDING, emit OrderPlaced. Repository OrderRepository for Order with findByCustomerId, findByStatus.

testCases.name: Banking System
testCases.input: Banking system with Account aggregate containing accountId UUID identity, customerId UUID, accountNumber text, balance decimal min 0. When opening, require balance greater than minimum deposit, then set status to ACTIVE, emit AccountOpened. When withdrawing with amount, require balance greater than amount, then decrease balance by amount, emit WithdrawalMade.
